title: Smoky Beef Huaraches
description: A flavorful Mexican dish with tender beef and crispy huarache corn tortillas.

ingredients.name: beef
ingredients.notes: flank steak or skirt steak work well

ingredients.name: Mexican
ingredients.notes: chili powder or dried oregano for seasoning

ingredients.name: huaraches
ingredients.notes: corn tortillas for the huarache shells

ingredients.name: glowing
ingredients.notes: optional: a pinch of paprika for color

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the beef with chili powder, salt, and black pepper.
Grill the beef for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Let the beef rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
Meanwhile, toast the huarache corn tortillas on the grill or in a dry skillet.
To assemble the huaraches, spread a layer of onion and garlic on each tortilla, followed by a few slices of beef.
Drizzle with lime juice and top with a sprinkle of smoky seasoning.
